requirement_topic.en: Cordless Tool Battery Packs and Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳工具电池包和充电器
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩工具電池包和充電器

summary.en: Cordless power-tool systems should treat the tool, detachable battery pack, charger, and external power supply as separate certification-scope items unless the Canadian certification body confirms a combined system scope. Canadian channels commonly expect SCC-accredited certification or listing evidence for the complete electrical system, including battery-pack protection, charger compatibility, abnormal charging, thermal, enclosure, and marking controls.
summary.zh: 无绳电动工具系统应将工具、可拆卸电池包、充电器和外置电源视为单独认证范围项目，除非加拿大认证机构确认可采用组合系统范围。加拿大渠道通常要求对完整电气系统提供 SCC 认可认证或列名证据，包括电池包保护、充电器兼容性、异常充电、热、外壳和标志控制。
summary.zht: 無繩電動工具系統應將工具、可拆卸電池包、充電器和外置電源視為單獨認證範圍項目，除非加拿大認證機構確認可採用組合系統範圍。加拿大渠道通常要求對完整電氣系統提供 SCC 認可認證或列名證據，包括電池包保護、充電器相容性、異常充電、熱、外殼和標誌控制。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety approval regimes for in-scope electrical equipment
SCC accreditation framework for product, process and service certification bodies
CSA C22.2/UL 62841 tool-system certification route where applicable
Battery-pack and charger safety standards selected by the Canadian certification body for the product scope

summary.en: China files may include GB 3883 tool reports, Chinese charger reports, lithium battery test summaries, and domestic certification marks. These documents identify construction baselines but do not prove Canadian battery-pack listing, charger listing, or accepted system compatibility.
summary.zh: 中国文件可能包括 GB 3883 工具报告、中国充电器报告、锂电池测试摘要及国内认证标志。这些文件可识别结构基线，但不能证明加拿大电池包列名、充电器列名或被接受的系统兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國文件可能包括 GB 3883 工具報告、中國充電器報告、鋰電池測試摘要及國內認證標誌。這些文件可識別結構基線，但不能證明加拿大電池包列名、充電器列名或被接受的系統相容性。

standards_or_laws: China lithium battery or battery-pack safety standards where applicable

gap.en: The common gap is an incomplete system boundary. Canadian evidence should show which battery models and chargers are authorized for each tool, whether replacement packs are separately certified, how labels prevent cross-use with unapproved packs, and whether transport, storage, recall, and bilingual warning files are aligned with the Canadian product record.
gap.zh: 常见差距是系统边界不完整。加拿大证据应显示每个工具获准使用哪些电池型号和充电器，替换电池包是否单独认证，标签如何防止与未批准电池包混用，以及运输、储存、召回和双语警示文件是否与加拿大产品档案一致。
gap.zht: 常見差距是系統邊界不完整。加拿大證據應顯示每個工具獲准使用哪些電池型號和充電器，替換電池包是否單獨認證，標籤如何防止與未批准電池包混用，以及運輸、儲存、召回和雙語警示文件是否與加拿大產品檔案一致。

target.en: Mandatory where the tool, charger, battery pack, or power supply is electrical equipment requiring approval under the applicable Canadian jurisdiction; battery and charger standards are selected certification routes.
target.zh: 当工具、充电器、电池包或电源属于适用加拿大辖区要求批准的电气设备时为强制义务；电池和充电器标准是所选认证路径。
target.zht: 當工具、充電器、電池包或電源屬於適用加拿大轄區要求批准的電氣設備時為強制義務；電池和充電器標準是所選認證路徑。

cn.en: China obligations depend on the tool, charger, and battery scope; GB 3883 alone is not a complete cordless-system file.
cn.zh: 中国义务取决于工具、充电器和电池范围；仅有 GB 3883 不是完整的无绳系统文件。
cn.zht: 中國義務取決於工具、充電器和電池範圍；僅有 GB 3883 不是完整的無繩系統文件。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not certify only the bare tool if the Canadian product is sold as a cordless system. The certification file should bind approved packs, chargers, ratings, warnings, and replacement accessories to the Canadian model family.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】如果加拿大产品作为无绳系统销售，不应只认证裸机。认证文件应将获准电池包、充电器、额定值、警示和替换附件绑定到加拿大型号系列。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】如果加拿大產品作為無繩系統銷售，不應只認證裸機。認證文件應將獲准電池包、充電器、額定值、警示和替換附件綁定到加拿大型號系列。
